title: Ubiquiti UACC-CWDM-4 - 4channel CWDM Mux/Demux modul
description: 4-channel CWDM Mux/Demux (1270 to 1330 nm) designed to increase the capacity of existing optical infrastructure, with rack-mountable options (4) channel ports in the range of 1270 to 1330 nm (1) Duplex LC UPC communication port for connecting to another CWDM Mux/Demux 4 using a pair of single-mode optical cables (1) Duplex LC UPC monitoring port for easy observation with a power meter or optical spectrum analyzer
